steps.title: Use the similar triangles
steps.content: Since line $LM$ is parallel to line $PQ$, triangles $LRM$ and $QRP$ are similar. Corresponding sides are proportional.

steps.title: Find the missing segment
steps.content:
Use corresponding sides $LR$ with $RQ$ and $MR$ with $RP$:
$$\frac{7}{RQ}=\frac{6}{11}$$
$$RQ=\frac{7\cdot11}{6}=\frac{77}{6}$$

steps.title: Add the collinear segments
steps.content:
The full length $LQ$ is $LR+RQ$:
$$LQ=7+\frac{77}{6}=\frac{42}{6}+\frac{77}{6}=\frac{119}{6}$$
The answer is D.
